reference: Hello, Habiba. You can start using a branded toner twice daily after washing your face with a mild cleanser, such as Cetaphil or Spongysal face wash, to reduce oiliness. You can use a non-comedogenic sunscreen three times daily. Also, use Brevoxyl cream topically at night and report back to me after a month.
